name: Garden Vegetarian Chowder
recipeInstructions: Use 2% evaporated milk for additional nutritional benefit. Serve with Yogurt Cheddar Scones (see recipe). In a large heavy saucepan, melt butter over medium-low heat; cook carrots, onion, celery, green pepper, and garlic, stirring occasionally, until softened. Stir in salt and pepper. Add potatoes and rutabaga; pour in stock and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer gently for 8 minutes or until vegetables are tender. Add zucchini; cook for an additional 5 minutes. Add corn and milk; heat through. Serve garnished with fresh dill.
